expectations.text: Skill pushes back: explicitly names the god-diagram anti-pattern OR proposes decomposition (per use case / per subsystem)
expectations.evidence: flags type mismatch (sequence wrong for whole-system map)

expectations.text: If it produces a diagram anyway, it produces one decomposed view (e.g., one scenario), not a 28-participant mega-diagram
Mentions a decomposition strategy (per-use-case, per-subsystem, C4 zoom-in)
expectations.evidence: offers alternative: C4 grouped by bounded context + per-flow sequences
